tasks.subject: Task 1: FA backend data layer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add SQL queries, wire-view + huma read Operations, and the shared RegisterForwardAuthApp helper; route the CLI create through it.

**Files:** db/queries/oidc.sql (+regen pkg/db/), pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go, cmd/prohibitorum/main.go, pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/queries/oidc.sql","pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go","pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run RegisterForwardAuth -v","acceptanceCriteria":["4 new queries generate cleanly","RegisterForwardAuthApp builds public PKCE client w/ exact callback redirect_uri + flag/host","CLI create uses the helper, output unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: FA admin HTTP endpoints + OIDC exclusion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add list/get/create/edit/set-disabled/delete handlers, register routes, exclude FA apps from the OIDC list/detail/edit/rotate, register the 3 sudo routes in the policy test.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps.go (new), pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps_test.go (new), pkg/server/server.go, pkg/server/handle_admin_oidc_clients.go, pkg/server/admin_route_policy_test.go

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_forward_auth_apps_test.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_oidc_clients.go","pkg/server/admin_route_policy_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'ForwardAuth|AdminMutationRoutesRequireSudo' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["FA list returns only FA apps; OIDC list excludes them","OIDC GET/PUT/rotate 404 for FA client id","create(409 on host conflict)/edit(redirect_uri re-derive)/set-disabled/delete work","policy test passes with 3 new FA sudo routes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: FA admin frontend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** List + detail views (reuse AppAccessCard), multiline CodeBlock for the Traefik snippet, routes, sidebar item, en/zh i18n, dist rebuild.

**Files:** dashboard/src/components/custom/CodeBlock.vue, dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppsView.vue (+ .test.ts), AdminForwardAuthAppDetailView.vue, router/index.ts, router/guard.test.ts, components/custom/AppSidebar.vue, locales/en.ts, locales/zh.ts, pkg/webui/dist

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/CodeBlock.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppsView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppDetailView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/admin/AdminForwardAuthAppsView.test.ts","dashboard/src/router/index.ts","dashboard/src/router/guard.test.ts","dashboard/src/components/custom/AppSidebar.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts","pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vue-tsc -b && npm run test -- --run && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs","acceptanceCriteria":["list + inline create (client-id/host/display-name)","detail edits name+host, host-substituted Traefik snippet, AppAccessCard, danger zone (no rotate)","sidebar item in Applications group","vue-tsc/vitest/contrast/en-zh parity pass; en.ts apostrophe grep clean; dist rebuilt"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Forward-auth sign-out
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Protected-domain sign_out (clear cookie+KV, bounce to IdP) + IdP-domain sso-logout (revoke session, validated redirect) with fail-closed open-redirect guard, tests, docs.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go, pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go, pkg/server/handle_forward_auth_signout.go (new), pkg/server/server.go, docs/forward-auth.md

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go","pkg/server/handle_forward_auth_signout.go","pkg/server/server.go","docs/forward-auth.md"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run 'SignOut|ValidatedForwardAuthReturnURL' -v","acceptanceCriteria":["sign_out deletes KV fa:session, clears cookie, 302 to sso-logout?rd=","sso-logout revokes session, redirects to rd only if host registered else /","ValidatedForwardAuthReturnURL rejects unregistered host/non-http/garbage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: End-to-end runtime verification (2A+2C)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove admin UI + sign-out against a running server (subagent-launched). Register FA app via UI, confirm exclusivity, drive verify/sign_out/sso-logout via curl; chromium DOM check. Fix anything found.

```json:metadata
{"files":[],"verifyCommand":"manual curl + chromium --dump-dom against subagent server","acceptanceCriteria":["FA app present in /forward-auth-apps, absent from /oidc-applications","GET /oidc-applications/{fa-id} = client_not_found","verify unknown->403, registered no-cookie->302 authorize w/ code_challenge","sign_out->302 sso-logout?rd; bogus rd->302 /"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Multi-domain dev harness
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Local harness: protected whoami app behind TLS front wired to forward-auth. Modeled on dev:federation; real hostnames/certs gitignored, example.test placeholders committed.

**Files:** scripts/dev-forward-auth.sh (new), cmd/prohibitorum/dev_forward_auth.go (new), cmd/prohibitorum/main.go, mise.toml, docs/forward-auth.md

```json:metadata
{"files":["scripts/dev-forward-auth.sh","cmd/prohibitorum/dev_forward_auth.go","cmd/prohibitorum/main.go","mise.toml","docs/forward-auth.md"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && shellcheck scripts/dev-forward-auth.sh","acceptanceCriteria":["whoami subcommand builds + echoes Remote-* headers","dev-forward-auth.sh shellcheck-clean, example.test placeholders, env template","mise dev:forward-auth registered","no real hostnames in tracked files"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Final gate + dist re-verify + memory/handoff
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full gate end-to-end, confirm committed dist current, update memory + handoff to Phase 2 complete.

**Files:** pkg/webui/dist (if diff), memory project_current_state.md, docs/superpowers/notes/2026-06-21-forward-auth-handoff.md

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/webui/dist","docs/superpowers/notes/2026-06-21-forward-auth-handoff.md"],"verifyCommand":"go vet ./... && go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./... ; cd dashboard && npm run test -- --run && npx vue-tsc -b && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["full backend+frontend gate green","npm run build leaves no dist diff","memory + handoff updated"]}
```
